login.signInPrompt: Sign in to access your dashboard.

error.title: Login Failed
error.invalidCredentials: The email or password you entered is incorrect. Please try again.
error.invalidMobile: Please enter a valid 10-digit mobile number.

diagnosisTab.title: Image-Based Diagnosis
diagnosisTab.description: Upload an image of an affected crop to get a diagnosis and remedies.
diagnosisTab.uploadPrompt: Click or drag & drop to upload image
diagnosisTab.voiceQueryDescription: Ask a question with your voice. If a diagnosis is active, it will be treated as a follow-up question.

error.failedDiagnosis: Failed to diagnose the image. Please try a different image or try again later.
error.failedTranscription: Failed to transcribe audio. Please try again.

marketTab.pricesDescription: Latest crop prices from the market.
marketTab.error: Failed to analyze market trends. Please try again later.

schemesTab.recsDescription: Fill in your details to find government schemes tailored for you.
schemesTab.yourRecsDescription: Based on your profile, here are the most relevant government schemes.
schemesTab.noSchemesDescription: Based on your profile, we couldn't find any highly relevant schemes from our list. You can browse all available schemes below.

allSchemes.title: All Government Schemes
allSchemes.description: Latest updates on schemes and policies for farmers.

schemesList.title: Pradhan Mantri Fasal Bima Yojana (PMFBY)
schemesList.description: An insurance service for farmers for their yields. It covers losses due to natural calamities, pests, and diseases.

schemesList.title: Pradhan Mantri Kisan Samman Nidhi (PM-KISAN)
schemesList.description: A scheme providing income support of ₹6,000 per year to all landholding farmer families.

schemesList.title: Kisan Credit Card (KCC) Scheme
schemesList.description: Provides farmers with timely access to credit for their cultivation needs.

schemesList.title: National Mission for Sustainable Agriculture (NMSA)
schemesList.description: Aims to make agriculture more productive, sustainable, remunerative, and climate-resilient.

indianStates: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

missingInfo.title: Missing Information
missingInfo.description: Please fill out all fields to get recommendations.

weatherTab.title: Weather & Climate Advisory
weatherTab.description: Get hyper-local weather forecasts and AI-powered farming advice.
weatherTab.error: Failed to fetch climate advisory. Please try again later.

myFarmTab.mapDescription: A satellite overview of your field, centered on your current location.

soilCard.title: Soil Health Card
soilCard.description: A summary of your soil's health and recommendations.
soilCard.orderDescription: Take action on your soil health report by ordering the necessary inputs.

droneModal.title: Drone Footage Analysis
droneModal.description: Upload a drone image of your field to get an AI-powered health assessment.
droneModal.uploadPrompt: Click or drag & drop to upload
droneModal.uploadToSee: Upload an image to see the analysis.

soilAnalysisModal.title: AI Soil Health Analysis
soilAnalysisModal.description: View your soil metrics and get an AI-powered analysis and recommendations.

supplierModal.title: Supplier Results
supplierModal.description: Showing potential suppliers for "{{product}}". This is a mock response.

historyModal.title: Data History
historyModal.userDescription: A record of your past activities and reports.
